inline_comments.message: The JIRA is already closed last year. It will be good if you can create a bug explaining the problem briefly and if it is UI issue then attaching a snapshot as well. Thanks!

The issue was found by Coverity Scan static analysis service. It looks like a typo to me that can break appropriate HTML layout. If you think it's not a bug, please let me know -- I'll instruct the analysis tool to ignore it. 

I've created POLICY-1961 for that kind of issues.
